Okay, so here's what we covered in this module. We started with an overview of all the different six-figure funnel formula follow-up sequences. Then we went through the second chance offer, the chain sequence flow, setting up the different sequences with Aweber, setting up the chain automation, and then we went over the different sequence messaging. Here's what to do now. First register your Aweber account. Second, set up your eight lists inside of Aweber, then set up your chain automation. Write your email messages for each sequence one at a time and then add them into Aweber.
